hardware: Linux 6.18.33-Unraid, Intel i5-13500, 32GB DDR5, NVMe storage

write.note: Sequential writes via MCP stdio. Each write includes FTS5 index update.

recall.note: FTS5 keyword search over 10,000 entities. 100 queries, random terms.

journal.note: Append-only journal writes via MCP stdio.

vault_export.note: Small sample. Scales linearly with entity count.

decay.note: Fresh entity (10 retrievals) ranks above stale entity (0 retrievals).

dedup.note: Second store with similar body_json detected as near-duplicate.

db.note: Includes all benchmark data. Entities from 5 categories.

known_issues: Category-filtered FTS5 recall returned fewer results than expected on bulk-inserted data. Investigating FTS5 index population edge case.
